description:
The Eye Manager Component is a component that is used for configuring the Eyes of an avatar, Both supporting simulated eye-movement, and real eye tracking using a headset with built in eye tracking sensors such as the HTC Vive pro eye.

This component is automatically set up by default when setting up an avatar with detectable eyes and blink shape keys.

fields.TargetPoint: The average point The eyes are trying to look at currently. Simulated or controlled.
fields.LeftEyeTargetPoint: The point The left eye specifically is looking at. Simulated or controlled. This can be different from ``TargetPoint`` if ``LeftEyeTargetOffset`` has a non zero value.
fields.RightEyeTargetPoint: The point The right eye specifically is looking at. Simulated or controlled. This can be different from ``TargetPoint`` if ``RightEyeTargetOffset`` has a non zero value.
fields.LeftEyeClose: How much the left eye is closed currently. Simulated or controlled.
fields.RightEyeClose: How much the right eye is closed currently. Simulated or controlled.
fields.CombinedEyeClose: an average of how much both eyes are closed.
fields.LeftEyePupilSizeMillimeters: how big the left eye's pupil is in millimeters currently. Simulated or controlled.
fields.RightEyePupilSizeMillimeters: How big the right eye's pupil is currently. Simulated or controlled.
fields.CombinedEyePupilSizeMillimeters: The average pupil size of both eyes. Simulated or controlled.
fields.LeftEyeWiden: A 0-1 value representing how much the left eye is being wider than rest. Simulated or controlled.
fields.RightEyeWiden: A 0-1 value representing how much the right eye is being wider than rest. Simulated or controlled.
fields.CombinedEyeWiden: An average of the eyes being widened. Simulated or controlled.
fields.LeftEyeSqueeze: A 0-1 value of how scrunched the upper and lower lids are on the left eye. Simulated or controlled.
fields.RightEyeSqueeze: A 0-1 value of how scrunched the upper and lower lids are on the right eye. Simulated or controlled.
fields.CombinedEyeSqueeze: An average of the squinting of both eyes. Simulated or controlled.
fields.LeftEyeFrown: The amount that the left eye is frowning according to the eye tracker if it exists.
fields.RightEyeFrown: The amount that the right eye is frowning according to the eye tracker if it exists.
fields.CombinedEyeFrown: The average amount of both eyes frowning according to the eye tracker if it exists.
fields.LeftEyeInnerBrowVertical: Eye tracking left inner brow vertical value.
fields.RightEyeInnerBrowVertical: Eye tracking right inner brow vertical value.
fields.CombinedEyeInnerBrowVertical: Eye tracking average inner brow vertical value.
fields.LeftEyeOuterBrowVertical: Eye tracking left outer brow vertical value.
fields.RightEyeOuterBrowVertical: Eye tracking right outer brow vertical value.
fields.CombinedEyeOuterBrowVertical: Eye tracking average outer brow vertical value.
fields.SimulatingUser: Determines the user simulating the eye manager
fields.SimulateOnHost: Determines if the eye manager is simulated by the host
fields.IgnoreLocalUserHead: Determines if the eye manager should ignore the local user's head
fields.UserHeadWeight: Weight for looking at other user heads
fields.GrippingHandWeight: Weight for looking at hands that are gripping
fields.ForcedCameraWeight: Weight for looking at cameras that are forcing eyes to look at it
fields.EyeReference: Slot that is used for referencing the origin of eye tracking data
fields.SaccadeSpeed: Speed the eyes move during saccades (does not affect eye tracking)
fields.LookTargetRoot: Slot that the eyes should look at
fields.LookTargetLocalPoint: The point that the eyes are looking at in local space.
fields.LeftEyeTargetOffset: The point that the left eye is looking at in global space.
fields.RightEyeTargetOffset: The point that the right eye is looking at in global space.
fields.LookTargetOffset: The point between the points both eyes are looking at in global space.
fields.MinRandomSaccadeInterval: Minimum time in seconds between random saccades
fields.MaxRandomSaccadeInterval: Maximum time in seconds between random saccades
fields.MinTargetSaccadeInterval: Minimum time in seconds between Targeting saccades
fields.MaxTargetSaccadeInterval: Maximum time in seconds between Targeting saccades
fields.MaxRandomSaccadeOffset: Maximum distance the eyes can randomly saccade off of the center of a target
fields.DefaultAcceptAngle: Maximum acceptance angle for random objects
fields.DefaultBreakAngle: Maximum angle before breaking eye contact with random objects
fields.HeadBreakAngle: Maximum angle before breaking eye contact with Players
fields.CameraBreakAngle: Maximum angle before breaking eye contact with cameras
fields.HandBreakAngle: Maximum angle before breaking eye contact with hands
fields.DistanceCompensationExp: At higher values, objects further away become easier to be within angle accept. Equation is [(ObjectAngleToEyeBall) * (Object Distance)^``DistanceCompensationExp`` == new (ObjectAngleToEyeBall)]
fields.LeftEyeCloseOverride: Overrides the left eyelid when open
fields.RightEyeCloseOverride: Overrides the right eyelid when open
fields.MinBlinkInterval: Minimum interval between blinks in seconds
fields.MaxBlinkInterval: Maximum interval between blinks in seconds
fields.BlinkSpeedSpread: How much to scale the randomness of blink speed. Basically to make more extreme values more common.
fields.PupilSizeNoiseSpeed: How fast the random pupil noise will move
fields.PupilSizeNoiseOffset: How much extra random noise the right eye pupil size will have vs the left one.
fields.EyeTrackingPupilSizeSmoothSpeed: Smooth speed for tracked pupil dilation
fields.MiniExpressionProbability: chance for a miniexpression to occur
fields.MiniExpressionInterval: Interval between attempting to do a miniexpression
fields.MiniExpressions: A list of mini expressions to use when attempting a mini expression.
